{{Infobox character
| name = Noroloth
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Herald grandson of Natarianath, Remnant, black dragon prince, Remnant of an ancient black dragon Herald
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Noroloth is an ancient black dragon Herald and the son of an emperor. Historically, he was involved in a bitter rivalry with a [[Sage]] who used runes; after the [[Sage]] poisoned his eldest son to prevent him from producing more offspring, Noroloth retaliated by burning her [[library]]. His castle was later damaged during a conflict with a [[Monarch]] intruder, though the interior remained partially preserved by protective [[scripts]]. In his current state, Noroloth exists as a [[Remnant]], appearing as a large black-and-red spirit. Though he has experienced madness, his spirit remains active and capable of interacting with others, such as [[Lindon]]. As a [[Remnant]], he has demonstrated the ability to control explosive forces within caverns and has offered assistance or instruction regarding the [[Path of Black Flame]].}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth]] was a [[Herald]] grandson of [[Natarianath]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth]] is a [[Remnant]] whose spirit is imprisoned within a script.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth]] is a black [[dragon]] prince.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth]]'s spirit can be hauled out bodily if [[Lindon]] tears open space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]] is the [[Remnant]] of an ancient black dragon Herald.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]]'s tail dissolves to smoke.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
